data.name: 近衛騎士薇茵的(非)日常
data.detailed_description:
【故事劇情】

——科蘇特德爾王國。

這是個位於大陸西方，自然景觀豐沛的小國。

主角薇茵身為王國近衛騎士團當中唯一的女性騎士，過著日夜鑽研劍術的生活。

某天，近衛騎士團突然舉辦了一次強化集訓。

比起參加的數十名男性騎士團員，女性單單只有薇茵一人。

從日常生活中無所不在的小小性騷擾，到男人們誇張的惡作劇，

各式各樣的色情麻煩都找上了薇茵！

在這五天的集訓生活當中，薇茵究竟能否保住自己的貞操呢？

 

【遊戲內容】

由於本作為短篇作品，因此完全沒有戰鬥要素。

遊戲的進行非常簡單，只要接連觸發事件，並度過這五天的期間。

一天中能夠行動的次數有早上、傍晚，還有晚上一共三次，根據時間不同，能夠選擇的事件也會產生變化。

根據玩家最後一天晚上所選擇的行動，將會分歧出五種結局。

通關之後，可以將回憶以及結局全部開放。

另外，也能夠保持著事件的開放狀況，從頭開始遊玩。（適合不想利用全開放開關的玩家）

 

【遊戲場景】

【主要登場人物】

薇茵

王國近衛騎士團當中唯一的女性騎士。26歲。

基本上性格十分認真，不過也具有一般的性知識，有些悶騷的傾向。

由於身處在騎士團這種滿是男性的職場，因此性方面的操心事接連不斷。

尤絲蒂

科蘇特德爾王國的第六公主。24歲。

也是薇茵宣誓效忠的主人。

過去曾經被大家認為是任性的公主，但最近似乎在努力做自己力所能及的事情。

※在本作中沒有劇情事件。

近衛騎士團的男人們

性慾旺盛，總是將薇茵當做配菜在打手槍。

年輕團員當中有許多人是處男。

data.short_description: 近衛騎士團突然舉行了強化集訓。 從日常生活中無所不在的小小性騷擾，到男人們誇張的惡作劇，各式各樣的色情麻煩都找上了薇茵！ 在這五天的集訓生活當中，薇茵究竟能否保住自己的貞操呢？
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Imperial Knightess Wein's Irregular Life
data.detailed_description:
【Storyline】

The Kingdom of Costodel.

This is a small kingdom with rich beautiful nature landscape, located in the west of the continent.

The protagonist, Wein, is the only female knight in the Imperial Knight as she spends all day training her sword skills.

Someday, the Imperial Knight suddenly held a training bootcamp.

There was only one female knight Wein compare to the dozens male knights.

Wein encountered a various of small sexual harassments to ridiculous pranks from the men, all kinds of sexual trouble!

Will Wein be able to protect her virginity during the 5 day in the training camp?

 

【Gameplay】

As a short game, there is no combat feature.

It's a very simple game in which you just trigger the events during the 5 days.

Each day is composed of three stages: Morning, Evening, and Night, with different choices of action available for you depending on the stage.

There are 5 endings depending on your choice in the final night.

After game completion, the Gallery and all endings are fully unlocked.

Also, you can play from the beginning with the events unlocked. (For those players who don't want to use the full unlock switch)

 

【Game scenes】

【Main characters】

Wein　

The only female knight in the Imperial Knight. 26 years old.

Mostly serious, have basic sexual knowledge, but secretly perverted.

Being in a male-dominated workplace like the Imperial Knights, there are a lot of sexual worries going on.

Yustie

The sixth princess of the Kingdom of Costodel.

Also the master Wein is pledged for.

She used to be known as a bit of a selfish and spoiled princess, but lately she's become more independent and hardworking.

※No plot event in this game.

Male Imperial Knights

Horny knights that use Wein as fap material.

A lot of the young knights are still virgins.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
